org.springframework.data.redis.cache.CacheStatisticsCollector

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.cache
Package providing a Redis implementation for Spring cache abstraction.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.collectStatistics(CacheStatisticsCollector cacheStatisticsCollector)
    Configure the CacheStatisticsCollector to use.
    RedisCacheWriter
    RedisCacheWriter.withStatisticsCollector(CacheStatisticsCollector cacheStatisticsCollector)
    Obtain a RedisCacheWriter using the given CacheStatisticsCollector to collect metrics.
